# fix: regulatory compliance — de-personalize portfolio, add OJK disclosures, instrument risk labels, data freshness warnings (redteam R1-R6)

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `00c1893762bc` — fix: regulatory compliance — de-personalize portfolio, add OJK disclosures, instrument risk labels, data freshness warnings (redteam R1-R6)

**Body**:

FIX 1: Portfolio page now shows "Ilustratif" not "your portfolio".
  Top red disclaimer: "Vestara is not licensed under POJK 21/2011."

FIX 2: Initial Disclosure Document (POJK 21/2011 Article 15/16) in expander:
  - What Vestara does/does not do (educational only)
  - Synthetic training data methodology disclosed
  - ±15-20% cost uncertainty stated
  - Historical return ≠ future guarantee
  - Link to sikapiuangmu.ojk.go.id

FIX 3: Instrument risk labels added per row in allocation table:
  - Reksa Dana Saham: "High risk — nilai dapat turun signifikan"
  - ORI/SBR: "Low risk — dijamin pemerintah"
  - Deposito: "Very low risk — dijamin LPS hingga Rp 2M"
  - DIRE/REITs: "Medium-high risk — terpengaruh pasar properti"

FIX 4: Data freshness warning on every cost estimate:
  "Estimasi biaya berdasarkan data 2025. Harga aktual dapat berbeda ±15-20%."

FIX 5: Lumpy goal equity warning for Property goals:
  Triggers when timeline < 5 years AND equity allocation > 20%.
  Warning: "Reksa Dana Saham dapat turun signifikan menjelang tanggal target."

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
